Bash(python3.exe -c "
import re, sys

filepath = 'src/App.jsx'

with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

single_chapter = re.compile\(r\\"'\(\\d+\):\(\\d+[–\\-]\\d+\) \(\\\([^']+\\\)\)'\\"\)

all_matches = {}
for m in single_chapter.finditer\(content\):
    full = m.group\(0\)
    chapter = m.group\(1\)
    desc = m.group\(3\)
    new = f\\"'{chapter} {desc}'\\"
    all_matches[full] = new

print\(f'Found {len\(all_matches\)} unique single-chapter labels to transform', file=sys.stderr\)
for old, new in sorted\(all_matches.items\(\)\):
    print\(f'  {old}  -->  {new}'\)
")
